tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # delete 3

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Allow-Agent-HTTP"
        set uuid 9cc3af58-2534-51f1-8dc2-09321212e962
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "Host-Ubuntu"
        set dstaddr "Public-DNS"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
        set traffic-shaper "high-priority"
    next
    edit 4
        set name "Throttle-Other-ICMP"
        set uuid a82340ca-2534-51f1-f6e5-1d9c8f4abe09
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "WAN-Gateway"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
set nat enable
        set traffic-shaper "ICMP-Throttle"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
